'''Needle fighters''' was a remote controlled [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] which were fitted with [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] rendezvous capabilities produced and used by the [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]].

==Characteristics==
They utilized [[Centrally Controlled Independent Replicant]] technology, enabling them to be centrally controlled and therefore be very small due to the absence of a pilot and computing systems. They were essentially robotic cylinders armed with [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], which was amazing considering their small size. Their size made them hard for [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] to detect, while they were painted black to prevent visual detection. They were powered by [[Tsil]]s. [[Bith/Legends|Bith]]-made miniature hyperdrives were provided by [[Seifax]], who also built the tiny hulls.

==History==
These starfighters operated in swarms and were fully capable of slowly demolishing much larger [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], even [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]], as the batteries of these vessels could not target the tiny vessels. Even starfighters had difficulty targeting the small, fast needles. However, all known vessels were disabled when [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] caused the return of all the [[tsil]]s that controlled the [[Centrally Controlled Independent Replicant|CCIR]] technology essential for running the Needles to [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]].
